title: CHARGE!!
description: Choose 2 cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]Minion Dive Bombs[/gold].
upgraded_description: Choose 2 cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]Minion Dive Bombs+[/gold].
notes: When played, the player chooses cards from their Draw Pile to transform into Minion Dive Bombs. If upgraded, the transformed minions are automatically upgraded to Minion Dive Bomb+.
